user.title: Connect to your Pixoo 64
user.description: Enter the local IP address of your Divoom Pixoo 64. A test connection (Channel/GetAllConf) is made before the entry is created.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the IP address and that it's on the same network.

init.title: Configure your Pixoo device
init.description: Update the device IP, how often it's polled for its authoritative state, and its pages. Pages are a raw YAML list of named entries, each with a `components` list. Optional per-page fields: `enabled` (Jinja template), `duration` (seconds shown, default 15), `scan_interval` (seconds between refreshes while shown — not the same as the device poll interval above).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the IP address and that it's on the same network.
error.invalid_schema: Each page needs a `name` (text) and a `components` (list) field.
